CustomField.description: Mirrors the “Line Amount Credited($)” field from Invoice Line Items, converted into the company reporting (Ledger) currency for financial reporting.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(leaseworks__Multicurrency_Enabled__c), leaseworks__Total_Amount_Credit_Num__c, IF( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c), NULL, IF( leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c = 0, 0, leaseworks__Total_Amount_Credit_Num__c* leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays the sum of all credits applied to this line item, expressed in the company reporting (Ledger) currency.
CustomField.label: Line Amount Credited (Ledger)
